shorts.description: ARCHBALD, LACKAWANNA COUNTY (WBRE/WYOU)— In April, 19 microphones popped up throughout Archbald neighborhoods and disappeared just days later without a trace. They were part of a sound study for Wildcat Ridge, a proposed 14 building 570-acre data center campus, and the borough's largest so far. On Thursday, the developer's sound study came under fire, down [...]

shorts.title: Thunderbirds beat Penguins 4-3 in OT, series tied 1-1
shorts.title_distilled: Thunderbirds beat Penguins 4-3 in OT, series tied 1-1.
shorts.description: (WBRE/WYOU) — The Springfield Thunderbirds beat the Wilkes-Barre Scranton Penguins 4-3 in Game 2 of the Third Round to lead the Atlantic Division Finals Series 2-0. Stay tuned for highlights in the 11 PM newscast! Bill Zonnon capitalized on a power play rebound to give the Penguins a 1-0 lead just over nine minutes into his [...]
